description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectilinear layout set on a green lawn. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels and open sections, including a visible patio or veranda area with outdoor furniture. Large windows and sliding glass doors are present on several facades, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The exterior walls are predominantly white, giving the building a clean and contemporary appearance. The layout includes distinct living spaces, with some rooms opening directly to the outside. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and an open patio area, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: From this view, the bungalow's side and a partially enclosed patio area with outdoor furniture are visible, along with the flat roof and white exterior walls.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main facade with large sliding glass doors, expansive windows, and the open patio/veranda area, showcasing the building's connection to the outdoors.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is visible here, showing a secondary entrance, smaller windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: This view displays the back facade with minimal windows and a service entrance, emphasizing the building's simple, rectilinear form.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
